ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "program" TEXT /* Name of the survey program */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period during which the survey was conducted */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the survey was conducted */,
  "ansi_code" INTEGER /* ANSI code for the state */,
  "affected_by" TEXT /* Factor affecting the bee colonies (e.g., Disease, Pesticides) */,
  "pct_impacted" REAL /* Percentage of colonies impacted by the factor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the survey data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the survey data was last updated */,
  "survey_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey data */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_affected_by FOREIGN KEY ("affected_by") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_program FOREIGN KEY ("program") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique state code (e.g., AL for Alabama) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "ansi_code" INTEGER /* ANSI code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the state's agricultural department */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the program started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the program ended */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., research, monitoring, conservation) */,
  "program_lead" TEXT /* Lead person or organization responsible for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor (e.g., Disease, Pesticides) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "factor_category" TEXT /* Category of the factor (e.g., diseases, pesticides, environmental factors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_factors" (
  "survey_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey-factor combination */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "factor_id" TEXT /* ID of the factor */,
  "pct_impacted" REAL /* Percentage of colonies impacted by the factor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the survey-factor combination was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the survey-factor combination was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_factors_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the user's jurisdiction */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, agency official) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event (e.g., specific data accessed or actions performed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "climate_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data entry */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code for the climate data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the climate data was recorded */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period during which the climate data was recorded */,
  "temperature_avg" REAL /* Average temperature during the period */,
  "precipitation_avg" REAL /* Average precipitation during the period */,
  "humidity_avg" REAL /* Average humidity during the period */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the climate data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the climate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("climate_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use data entry */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code for the land use data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the land use data was recorded */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period during which the land use data was recorded */,
  "urban_area" REAL /* Percentage of urban area */,
  "agricultural_area" REAL /* Percentage of agricultural area */,
  "forest_area" REAL /* Percentage of forest area */,
  "water_area" REAL /* Percentage of water area */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the land use data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality or reliability of the land use data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_use_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)
